name: kubecon-endpointslice-demo
description: Zero-dependency hold + lease + free-pool router over the Kubernetes EndpointSlice API. The live demo from the KubeCon + CloudNativeCon India 2026 talk "Why We Ditched Kube-proxy": hold a request until a browser pod is free, lease it exclusively, and dial the pod IP directly.
author: Rajat Khanna

scripts.test: node test/router.smoke.js && node test/worker-drain.smoke.js && node test/router-integration.smoke.js
